name: 40 MG Ato Moxetine Hydrochloride Tablets
about: 40 MG Atomoxetine Hydrochloride Tablets are a type of general medicine that is prescribed by doctors to treat attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) in both children and adults. These tablets contain 40mg of atomoxetine hydrochloride, which works by increasing the levels of certain chemicals in the brain that help in improving attention, focus, and reducing impulsiveness. The dosage of these tablets should be taken as per the doctors recommendation. These tablets are manufactured in India and are available in a physical form of tablets. It is recommended to store these tablets in a cool place to maintain their effectiveness.

faq.a: These tablets are used to treat attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) in both children and adults.

faq.a: The dosage of these tablets should be taken as per the doctors recommendation.
